title: Integrations
description: Connect third-party services to sync your inventory, orders, and products automatically

page.title: Integrations
page.description: Connect third-party services to sync your inventory, orders, and products automatically

square.title: Square POS
square.description: Sync products, inventory, and orders from Square
square.notConnectedDescription: Connect your Square account to automatically sync products, inventory levels, and order data with LIFO AI.
square.connectSubtitle: Automate your inventory management with Square integration
square.benefit1Description: Import your entire catalog from Square with prices and variants
square.benefit3Description: Track sales and update batch quantities as orders are placed
square.securityDescription: Your data is protected with industry-standard encryption
square.securityPoint1: OAuth 2.0 authentication ensures secure access to your Square account
square.securityPoint2: All data is encrypted in transit and at rest
square.securityPoint3: You can disconnect at any time to revoke access
square.connectDescription: Click below to authorize LIFO AI to access your Square account
square.redirectNotice: You'll be redirected to Square to authorize the connection
square.manageSubtitle: Manage your Square integration and sync settings
square.connectedLocationsDescription: {count} locations connected to your Square account
square.connectedLocationsDescriptionSingle: 1 location connected to your Square account
square.helpPoint1: Sync runs automatically every hour in the background
square.helpPoint2: Use manual sync buttons if you need to update immediately
square.helpPoint3: Disconnect will deactivate the integration but preserve your data

callback.processingDescription: Please wait while we set up your store
callback.errorDescription: We couldn't connect your Square account

disconnect.title: Disconnect Square?
disconnect.description: This will deactivate your Square integration.
disconnect.warningReconnect: You can reconnect at any time
disconnect.warningData: Your historical data will be preserved

errors.signInRequired: Please sign in to connect Square
